summary: Premium Airport Lounge Face Recognition Entry System website with airline-inspired premium light theme, scroll-based sections for hero, face detection, AI processing, verification result, and access confirmation.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Wide panoramic airport premium lounge interior — warm ambient lighting, floor-to-ceiling windows with runway view, plush seating, marble surfaces, soft gold and white tones, no people, ultra-clean and luxurious atmosphere (lounge-hero.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Build a top navigation bar containing exactly four links: 'Live Entry', 'Member Management', 'Entry Logs', and 'Security & System Status'. The nav bar should be fixed to the top, use a white or soft-grey background, subtle bottom shadow, and smooth scroll to the corresponding page section on click. Do not include any other navigation items.

Create a full-width Hero Section (Section 1) at the top of the homepage. Display the title 'Premium Lounge AI – Face Recognition Entry System', a short professional subtitle describing the system, and use the generated lounge hero background image as the section background. Overlay a subtle dark gradient for text legibility. Typography should be elegant and spacious.

Create a Face Detection Section (Section 2) with a centered card containing a simulated camera feed area (static placeholder with a face detection bounding-box frame overlay drawn with CSS or SVG), a pulsing scan animation around the frame, and explanatory text describing the face recognition capture process.

Create an AI Processing Section (Section 3) displaying a three-step workflow using structured information blocks or a stepper component: Step 1 – 'Capturing Image', Step 2 – 'Extracting Facial Features', Step 3 – 'Matching Premium Member Database'. Each step should have an icon, label, and a short description. Include a subtle animated progress indicator between steps.

Create a Verification Result Section (Section 4) that calls simulateVerification from the backend and displays an information panel with: Passenger Name, Membership Tier, Confidence Score, and Verification Time. Below the panel, show a large status badge: green 'Access Granted' or red 'Access Denied' based on the result. Include a 'Run Verification' button that triggers the backend call and animates the result reveal.

Create an Access Confirmation Section (Section 5) that shows a clean confirmation card with the message 'Access Authorized – Welcome to Premium Lounge' using premium typography. Include a checkmark icon and a soft green accent. This section should be conditionally styled (confirmation vs. denial state) based on the verification result from Section 4.

Create a Member Management section (accessible via nav and as a full page section) that lists existing members in a clean table or card grid, and provides a form to add a new member (name, membership tier). The form should call the addMember backend function and refresh the list on success.

Create an Entry Logs section (accessible via nav) that displays a chronological log of verification attempts. Each log entry should show timestamp, passenger name (or 'Unknown'), result (Granted / Denied), and confidence score. Log data should be stored in the backend and populated on each simulateVerification call.

Create a Security & System Status section (accessible via nav) that displays a system health dashboard with static but realistic status indicators: Face Recognition Engine (Online), Database Connection (Secure), Camera Feed (Active), Last System Check (timestamp). Use green/amber/red status dots for each indicator.

Apply a consistent premium light theme across the entire application: white or soft-grey (#F5F5F7 range) backgrounds, deep charcoal or near-black typography, gold or muted teal as the primary accent color, generous whitespace, elegant sans-serif typography (e.g., Inter or similar), subtle card shadows, and smooth CSS scroll-behavior. Minimal micro-animations on hover and section reveal. No blue/purple color palette.
Render the generated hero background image (lounge-hero.dim_1920x1080.png) as a static asset in the Hero Section background.

new_feature_requests.summary: Implement a backend actor that stores and manages member records with fields: name, membership tier (e.g., Gold, Platinum, Diamond), and a mock facial feature hash. Expose query and update functions: addMember, getMembers, getMemberById, and a simulateVerification function that accepts a mock image hash and returns a verification result object (passengerName, membershipTier, confidenceScore, verificationTime, accessGranted).
